title: CreateVerse Modpack
description: Explore endless possibilities in CreateVerse, a versatile modpack for all playstyles!
body:
# CreateVerse Modpack
Welcome to Createverse, a modpack built on Forge 1.20.1 (now Neoforge 1.21.1), designed for the [CreateVerse SMP](https://discord.com/invite/E8q2tc2jz7) community. Dive into an exciting world featuring the Create mod and its variety of intriguing addons, Farmer's Delight, Continents, CC: Tweaked, Create: Northstar, among many others. 

This modpack offers a diverse experience without a specific theme, welcoming players from every corner of the gaming spectrum—whether you're an adventurer, a tech enthusiast, a mechanical whiz, a dedicated farmer, or a grinding guru.

<details>
<summary>Attribution</summary>

The following mods were added directly from curseforge as they were not available on Modrinth:
- [MrCrayfish's Furniture Mod: Refurbished](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/refurbished-furniture)
- [Framework](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/framework)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Disclaimer</summary>

All mods are their respective creators' property; Createverse does not claim ownership of any third-party content.

</details>
